toolbox_labels.数据与文本绑定（放入初始化块）: Data and text binding (put in initialization block)

miaoui_init.message0: Create MiaoUI %1 using U8g2 object %2 first item %3 initialized by MiaoUI screen %4
miaoui_init.tooltip: Create MiaoUI objects, generate menu hooks, launch menus, and automatically refresh them in the loop

miaoui_add_page.tooltip: Create a text or icon menu page

miaoui_add_item.message0: Add menu item %1 text %2 to page %3 type %4 icon expression %5
miaoui_add_item.tooltip: Add normal, data, text or waveform menu items to the page; the icon page can be filled with 30×30 XBM array names

miaoui_add_navigation_item.message0: Add navigation item %1 text %2 from page %3 %4 to page %5 icon expression %6
miaoui_add_navigation_item.tooltip: Add navigation items to enter submenus or return to the previous page

miaoui_add_action_item.message0: Add action item %1 text %2 to page %3 behavior %4 icon expression %5
miaoui_add_action_item.tooltip: Add one-time or recurring action menu items with Blockly callback code

miaoui_bind_number.message0: Bind value item %1 Variable %2 Type %3 Permission %4
miaoui_bind_number.message1: Initial value %1 Minimum %2 Maximum %3 Step %4 Callback timing %5
miaoui_bind_number.tooltip: Create integer/floating point variables and their editing ranges for data items or waveform items

miaoui_bind_switch.message0: Binding switch item %1 Variable %2 Initial value %3 Permission %4 Callback timing %5
miaoui_bind_switch.tooltip: Create read-write or read-only switch variables for data items

miaoui_bind_text.tooltip: Bind UTF-8 text content and default font to text menu items

miaoui_set_buttons.message0: MiaoUI %1 Setting button Up %2 Down %3 Confirm %4 Valid level %5 Pin mode %6
miaoui_set_buttons.tooltip: Configure three GPIO buttons: up, down, and confirm; fill in -1 for the pin to disable it

miaoui_set_button_repeat.message0: MiaoUI %1 Set long press repeat delay %2 milliseconds interval %3 milliseconds
miaoui_set_button_repeat.tooltip: Enable long press auto-repeat; turn off at interval 0

miaoui_push_action.tooltip: Inject operations from encoder, serial port, touch and other sources into eight input queues

miaoui_try_push_action.tooltip: Returns true if the operation is successfully added to the queue, and returns false if the queue is full.

miaoui_update.tooltip: Input, animation and drawing are handled manually once; the initialization block is automatically and continuously refreshed

miaoui_set_background.tooltip: Toggle menu display with white text on black background or black text on white background

miaoui_is_begun.tooltip: Return to whether the menu has been successfully launched

miaoui_last_error_code.tooltip: Returns the numeric code of the last startup error, 0 means no error

miaoui_last_error_message.tooltip: Returns the English description of the last startup error

miaoui_current_item_name.tooltip: Returns the text of the currently selected menu item, or an empty string when it is not started.
